meaning: n.皮洛(古希腊极端怀疑主义哲学家)
examples: Then Pyrrho proposed his agnosticism which negated the possibility of all knowledge and was regarded as a final conclusion of ancient skepticism.
Many of the etymologies I saw make reference to someone called Pyrrho of Elis who lived about 2, 300 years ago and is seen as originating a skeptical philosophy.
